should_trigger: Write a Rust function that parses a config file and returns the parsed settings, handling missing keys gracefully.

Review this .rs file and tell me where it deviates from Rust best practices.
Make this Rust code idiomatic — I just translated it from C and it shows.
Run through the clippy warnings on this Rust file and clean them up properly.
